controls.name: Code Review Approval
controls.description: All code changes must be peer-reviewed and approved before merging.
controls.remediation: Ensure a qualified reviewer approves the pull request before deployment.

controls.name: Security Scan Completed
controls.description: Automated SAST/DAST security scanning must be completed.
controls.remediation: Run the required security scanning tools and attach results to the release package.

controls.name: No Critical Vulnerabilities
controls.description: Zero critical CVEs must be present at time of deployment.
controls.remediation: Remediate or formally accept all critical vulnerabilities with documented risk approval.

controls.name: Deployment Approval (Change Management)
controls.description: Change Advisory Board (CAB) or designated approver must sign off on deployment.
controls.remediation: Submit change request and obtain required approvals before proceeding.

controls.name: Access Control Validation (RBAC)
controls.description: Role-Based Access Control must be reviewed and validated for least privilege.
controls.remediation: Conduct access review and remove excessive permissions. Document RBAC matrix.

controls.name: Logging and Monitoring Enabled
controls.description: Audit logging and alerting must be active for all in-scope systems.
controls.remediation: Enable log forwarding to SIEM and configure alert thresholds.

controls.name: Segregation of Duties Enforced
controls.description: No single individual can both develop and approve changes to production.
controls.remediation: Review user access to ensure developers cannot self-approve production deployments.

controls.name: Data Privacy Impact Assessment
controls.description: A DPIA must be completed if the system processes personal data.
controls.remediation: Complete a Data Privacy Impact Assessment and obtain DPO sign-off.

controls.name: AI Risk Classification (EU AI Act)
controls.description: If the system contains AI/ML components, an EU AI Act risk classification must be documented.
controls.remediation: Classify the AI system (Minimal/Limited/High/Unacceptable risk) and document accordingly.
